summary: A Go-based CLI tool for orchestrating and running smoke tests with schema validation, prerequisite checking, and assertion reporting.
patterns: Separation of concerns (detector, reporter, runner, schema)
concerns: No production code files listed in hot files, only tests and templates
Early bootstrap phase with potential for unstable APIs
suggestions: Consolidate configuration into a single standard directory
Add integration tests beyond the self-smoke config
Document the schema and CLI usage in the root/ docs folder
